requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality Evidence — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 for Chad PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量证据——乍得光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質證據——乍得光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000

summary.en: For Chad PV inverter projects, EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared around IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and IEC 61000-series expectations. SNE project review and interconnection documents should define final report scope, while high-ambient and dust-prone operating assumptions should be explicitly included.
summary.zh: 对乍得光伏逆变器项目，EMC与电能质量证据应围绕适用于光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列要求进行准备。SNE项目审核和并网文件应明确最终报告范围，同时在安装条件中明确高温和粉尘环境假设。
summary.zht: 對乍得光伏逆變器專案，EMC與電能品質證據應圍繞適用於太陽能功率轉換設備的IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列要求進行準備。SNE專案審核及並網文件應明確最終報告範圍，同時於安裝條件中明確高溫和粉塵環境假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004 and CNAS reports for PV inverter EMC planning. These are useful for baseline engineering but need to be mapped to each Chad project package requiring IEC 61000 and IEC 62920 clause-by-clause evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和CNAS报告进行逆变器EMC策划。这些对工程基线有用，但需要按乍得项目文件要求逐条映射到IEC 61000和IEC 62920条款。
summary.zht: 中國通常用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和CNAS報告進行逆變器EMC策劃。這些對工程基線有用，但需要按乍得項目文件要求逐條映射到IEC 61000和IEC 62920條款。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范

gap.en: Gap: Chinese EMC reports should be remapped into the exact required IEC clause matrix for each exported model and site setting. For Chad, confirm local assumptions for harmonics, flicker, and voltage-sag behavior beyond basic IEC reports.
gap.zh: 差距：需将中国EMC报告按每台输出机型与每个项目场景映射到所要求的IEC条款矩阵。对乍得而言，还需确认项目级谐波、闪变和电压暂降假设，而不仅是一般IEC对照文件。
gap.zht: 差距：需將中國EMC報告按每台輸出機型與每個項目場景映射到所要求的IEC條款矩陣。對乍得而言，還需確認項目級諧波、閃變和電壓暫降假設，而不僅是一般IEC對照文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where SNE or project scope requires IEC-aligned EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence is preparatory only; project alignment in Chad is required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence for Chad projects, then confirm site-specific harmonics, flicker, and voltage-dip requirements in project acceptance documents before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乍得项目应以IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据为基础，并在出货前核对项目文件中的场站谐波、闪变和电压暂降要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 乍得項目應以IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據為基礎，並在出貨前核對項目文件中的場站諧波、閃變和電壓暫降要求。
